mapper.update: update Writing set image_adder_list=#{adder} where user_id=#{userId} and writing_id=#{writingId} and image_adder_list='[]' and is_exist=1
mapper.select: select image_adder_list from Writing where user_id=#{userId} and writing_id=#{writingId} and is_exist=1
mapper.update: update Writing set is_exist=0 where user_id=#{userId} and writing_id=#{writingId} and is_exist=1
